title: QUIC RFC 9001 TLS KeyUpdate Classifier Work Item
summary: Add the narrow post-handshake TLS KeyUpdate classifier seam, preserve the separate managed key-phase install path, and route prohibited KeyUpdate messages into the existing KeyUpdateError close behavior.
planned_changes:
- Add a TLS KeyUpdate post-handshake classifier in QuicTlsTranscriptProgress.
- Publish a prohibited KeyUpdate update from the bridge driver.
- Keep QuicTransportTlsBridgeState and QuicConnectionRuntime on the existing close path.
- Add positive and negative requirement-home coverage for the real message-processing seam.
- Update the RFC 9001 gap ledger and spec trace to point the 0009/0010 proof at this slice.
verification_plan: Run the RFC 9001 Section 6 requirement-home tests for the prohibited TLS KeyUpdate and connection-error clauses, confirm the real TLS message-processing seam emits the prohibited-update state for a TLS KeyUpdate message, confirm the NewSessionTicket path still publishes ticket state, and render plus validate the RFC 9001 SpecTrace JSON artifacts.
out_of_scope: Changing the managed QUIC key-phase install path.
Adding public API or interop surface for TLS KeyUpdate.
completion_notes: Optional implementation notes, deviations, or follow-up items.
